problem id: 551e93e7
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) AND SHR(4)

examples:
  11100101 -> 00001000
  01011000 -> 00000100
  00001111 -> 00000000
  00010101 -> 00000001
  11011100 -> 00000101
  00010000 -> 00000000
  10111110 -> 00001011
  00100101 -> 00000000
  11101111 -> 00001010
  01001011 -> 00000000

query: 00000111
predicted answer: 00000000
